sanskrit: धृतराष्ट्र उवाच धर्मक्षेत्रे कुरुक्षेत्रे समवेता युयुत्सवः
transliteration: dhritarashtra uvacha dharma-kshetre kuru-kshetre samaveta yuyutsavah
meaning: Dhritarashtra said: O Sanjaya, after assembling on the holy field of Kurukshetra, what did my sons and the sons of Pandu do?
meaningHindi: धृतराष्ट्र बोले: हे संजय, धर्मभूमि कुरुक्षेत्र में एकत्रित होकर मेरे पुत्रों और पाण्डु के पुत्रों ने क्या किया?
question: Who asked Sanjaya about the battle?

sanskrit: संजय उवाच दृष्ट्वा तु पाण्डवानीकं व्यूढं दुर्योधनस्तदा
transliteration: sanjaya uvacha drishtva tu pandavanikam vyudham duryodhanas tada
meaning: Sanjaya said: King Duryodhana, seeing the army of the Pandavas drawn up in military formation, approached his teacher.
meaningHindi: संजय बोले: दुर्योधन ने पाण्डवों की सेना को व्यवस्थित देखकर अपने गुरु के पास जाकर कहा।
question: Who spoke after Dhritarashtra?

meaning: Behold, O teacher, this mighty army of the sons of Pandu expertly arranged by your disciple.
meaningHindi: हे आचार्य! पाण्डु पुत्रों की इस विशाल सेना को देखिए जो आपके ही शिष्य द्वारा सजाई गई है।
question: Who arranged the Pandava army?

meaning: In this army there are many heroic bowmen equal in fighting to Bhima and Arjuna.
meaningHindi: इस सेना में भीम और अर्जुन के समान युद्ध करने वाले अनेक वीर धनुर्धर हैं।
question: Who are mentioned as great warriors?

meaning: There are also great fighters like Dhrishtaketu, Chekitana and the valiant king of Kashi.
meaningHindi: धृष्टकेतु, चेकितान और काशी के वीर राजा जैसे महान योद्धा भी हैं।
question: Which king is mentioned as a warrior?

transliteration: yudhamanyush cha vikranta uttamaujash cha viryavan
meaning: There are also powerful fighters like Yudhamanyu and Uttamauja.
meaningHindi: यहाँ युधामन्यु और उत्तमौजा जैसे शक्तिशाली योद्धा भी हैं।
question: Which warriors are mentioned in this verse?

sanskrit: अस्माकं तु विशिष्टा ये तान्निबोध द्विजोत्तम
transliteration: asmakam tu vishishta ye tan nibodha dvijottama
meaning: But for your information, O best of the brahmanas, let me tell you about the commanders of my army.
meaningHindi: हे ब्राह्मणश्रेष्ठ, अब मेरी सेना के प्रमुख नायकों के विषय में सुनिए।
question: Who is being addressed as best of Brahmanas?

transliteration: bhavan bhishmash cha karnash cha kripash cha samitinjayah
meaning: There are personalities like yourself, Bhishma, Karna, Kripa and others.
meaningHindi: आप स्वयं, भीष्म, कर्ण और कृपाचार्य जैसे महान योद्धा हैं।
question: Which warrior is mentioned here?

sanskrit: अन्ये च बहवः शूरा मदर्थे त्यक्तजीविताः
transliteration: anye cha bahavah shura mad-arthe tyakta-jivitah
meaning: There are many other heroes ready to give up their lives for my sake.
meaningHindi: मेरे लिए अपने प्राण त्यागने को तैयार अनेक वीर योद्धा हैं।
question: What are the warriors ready to sacrifice?

meaning: Our strength, protected by Bhishma, is unlimited.
meaningHindi: भीष्म द्वारा संरक्षित हमारी सेना असीमित है।
question: Who protects the Kaurava army?
